teams.name: Brand & Awareness
teams.description: Manages upper-funnel brand campaigns focused on reach, awareness, and video across display and programmatic channels.
teams.notes: Brand lift studies run quarterly via Nielsen. All campaigns must follow brand safety guidelines in brand_guidelines.pdf.

teams.name: Performance & Acquisition
teams.description: Drives direct response: leads, purchases, and app installs. Manages the full conversion funnel from prospecting to retargeting.
teams.notes: ROAS target is 4.0x blended. CPA targets vary by product line — see team_objectives.json. Weekly budget reviews every Monday 9am.

teams.name: Paid Social & Emerging
teams.description: Manages paid social across LinkedIn (B2B) and TikTok/Snap (B2C awareness). Tests new platforms before scaling.
teams.notes: LinkedIn focus is B2B lead gen (MQL targets set by sales ops). TikTok is brand/awareness with 18-34 demo focus.
